api_testing_requests.description: Pre-built test requests for RAG Pipeline API - Copy-paste into Swagger UI

tests.name: 1. Get API Info
tests.description: Verify API is running and get overview

phase_2_single_ingestion.description: Ingest first document and test queries

tests.name: 4. Check Status (1 Document)
tests.description: Should show 1 document and ML-related topics

tests.name: Q2: What are the types of machine learning?

request_body.query: What are the types of machine learning?

tests.name: Q3: What are machine learning applications?

phase_5_comprehensive_queries.description: Test comprehensive queries across all documents

request_body.query: What are neural networks and how do they work?

deep_learning_queries.name: Q6: How do we train neural networks?

request_body.query: How do we train neural networks?

nlp_queries.name: Q7: What is natural language processing?

request_body.query: What are the applications of natural language processing?

comparison_queries.name: Q9: Explain differences between ML and AI

request_body.query: What is the difference between machine learning and artificial intelligence?

comparison_queries.name: Q10: Explain differences between ML and DL

request_body.query: What is the difference between machine learning and deep learning?

edge_case_queries.name: Q11: Query about non-existent topic

request_body.query: What is quantum computing and how does it relate to machine learning?

edge_case_queries.note: May return empty or low-confidence answer

tests.name: 7. Batch Ingest All Files
tests.instructions: In Swagger: Click 'Try it out' → Select files → Execute

context_chunks.distance: Vector similarity - LOWER is better (0.0-0.3 excellent, 0.3-0.6 good, 0.6+ poor)
context_chunks.cross_encoder_score: Re-ranking confidence - HIGHER is better (>0.8 excellent, 0.5-0.8 good, <0.5 poor)

intent_analysis.is_relevant: Is the query relevant to KB content?
intent_analysis.confidence: How confident is the relevance check?

query_response_fields.retrieval_relevant: Whether any relevant chunks were found
query_response_fields.retrieval_sufficient: Whether enough context was found to answer

testing_tips: Start with Phase 1 to verify the API is running
Ingest documents in Phase 2-4 before testing queries
Use Swagger UI (/docs) for easiest interactive testing
Check context_chunks to verify sources - important for grounding!
Compare distance and cross_encoder_score - they should correlate
Test edge cases (Q11-Q12) to understand system limitations
Monitor response times - first query from each doc is slower (embedding generation)
Batch ingestion is faster than single ingestion for multiple files
